name: The Mythical City 2
detailed_description:
Protect your city from evil! Your people are counting on you! Before the battle, build walls and install attacking towers. Place dangerous spikes so that the enemy takes damage! During the battle, summon your warriors to attack the enemy! Be careful, there are different types of enemies, some attacking from close, some from far away. Someone divides into parts after death, someone moves faster than others. Think about tactics and you will succeed!

Features:
  • Dynamic gameplay
  • Crowds of different enemies
  • A tactical game
  • Different ways to defend against enemies
  • 10 levels of the game
  • Saving current wins
  • Interesting gameplay
